subject: Two figures in dark armor moving through a shadowed corridor — one wears a blue masked helm, the other carries a glowing blade
description: Two figures move through a dim stone corridor. The foreground figure wears heavy dark armor with a blue-tinted skull-like mask and crouches slightly in a forward lurch. The second figure follows behind in dark close-fitting clothes, carrying a weapon that emits a faint blue-white glow. The environment is dark stone, with minimal lighting from what appears to be a dim source off-frame. The palette is almost entirely dark — deep blue, black, and grey — with only the glowing weapon and a few accents of gold on the foreground armor providing contrast. The composition conveys infiltration and covert movement.
foreground: Armored figure in skull-masked blue helm crouching forward in a dark corridor
background: Second figure in dark clothes with glowing blade, dim stone corridor
